# Sentry Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official Sentry agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It defines the gold standard for full-stack observability and real-time error management.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following skills are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### Observability & Performance
- **getsentry-skills**: Official protocols for integrating Sentry's real-time monitoring and tracing capabilities.

## 🔗 Integrated Sub-Skills (Complete List)
*The system maintains 1:1 parity with the following `.ai/skills/official-getsentry-*` capability nodes:*

- `official-getsentry-skills`

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
